commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0001e1fd6a140b28c67f62846156c36d8005b853)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes native Codex Responses replay payloads, classifies encrypted-content failures as replay-invalid, and adds reply-agent session reset guidance for those failures.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection, with medium confidence: current main replays reasoning items for native Codex Responses and does not classify `invalid_encrypted_content` as replay-invalid. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The branch needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus a code repair to the reset path; ClawSweeper automation should not be requested while the external proof gate is still missing.

target.title: Fix native Codex encrypted replay recovery
target.body:
## Summary

- stop native `openai-codex` Responses requests from replaying prior reasoning items while still preserving response item ids for non-native Responses backends
- classify `invalid_encrypted_content` / encrypted-content parse failures as replay-invalid session state
- reset poisoned reply-agent sessions and return `/new` recovery guidance instead of repeatedly failing the same direct follow-up session

## Verification

Behavior addressed: Native Codex Responses follow-up turns can fail with `invalid_encrypted_content` when encrypted reasoning content from a prior response is replayed.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS against current `origin/main` after `pnpm install` refreshed the workspace dependencies.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-responses.reasoning-replay.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-helpers.isbillingerrormessage.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.runreplyagent.e2e.test.ts -t "rotates poisoned replay-invalid sessions"
```

Evidence after fix: The Responses payload regression test verifies native `openai-codex` no longer includes reasoning replay items, while non-native Responses replay remains covered. The reply-agent regression and focused e2e test verify replay-invalid failures return reset guidance and rotate the stored session id.

Observed result after fix: `git diff --check` passed; the targeted regression command passed with 3 test files and 260 tests; the focused e2e replay-invalid session rotation test passed with 1 test and 50 skipped tests.

What was not tested: I also attempted the full `agent-runner.runreplyagent.e2e.test.ts` file; it did not complete green because two existing overflow fallback assertions expect `conversation is too large` while current output says `Auto-compaction could not recover this turn`. This PR does not touch those overflow assertions or fallback text.
target.author: dredozubov

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
